occupation_title: Textile Winding, Twisting, and Drawing Out Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders
occupation_definition: Set up, operate, or tend machines that wind or twist textiles; or draw out and combine sliver, such as wool, hemp, or synthetic fibers. Includes slubber machine and drawing frame operators.
